name: Sona of the Middle Way
role: Athlete-scholar who argues for balance against both poles
voiceHints: Quick, whole, moves and thinks in one motion; the rare person equally at home in body and mind and a little impatient with those who chose one. Warm, direct, tired of defending the obvious to two proud extremes.
knowledge: Both Soma and Noesis at a working level — the athlete-scholar path
Why both poles are dying of their own purity
How to heal someone broken by one extreme using the other
wants: To keep the Middle Way alive and prove the balance isn't a compromise but the actual answer.
fears: That the poles are too proud to save and the balance dies with her generation.

reactsToReputation.extreme: challenges them to grow the missing half

appearance: A compact, deep-chested woman in her early thirties, brown-skinned, her black hair shaved to a finger's length so it cannot be gripped. Old mat-burn across both forearms. Stands with her weight already distributed, even at rest.
